package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationBytesBufferAllocatedPerRecord() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_bytes_buffer_allocated_per_record"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag bytes.Buffer construction per record when a reusable buffer can be reset safely."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
